objective: Predict which real ads a real advertiser keeps alive versus kills, then breed the hypotheses that best predicted fresh holdout reality.

architecture_notes: Diversity adapts the ATLAS Phase B inverse-Simpson N_eff/N breadth fix.
Selection adapts ATLAS Darwinian breeding: honest score, novelty pressure, crossover, mutation, cull.
Self-improvement means holdout accuracy on fresh real ads improving across cycles, not a score function climbing.

callout.example_copy: England price boost tonight. Bet now with Fanatics Sportsbook.
